title: Crunchy Nostalgic Egyptian Beef Kidney Stir-fry
description: A hearty and herbal stir-fry featuring tender beef kidneys seasoned with a mix of traditional Egyptian spices to create a nostalgic dish that is both crunchy and flavorful.
instructions: Heat sesame oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add cumin seeds and sauté until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add sliced onions and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Chop garlic cloves and add to the wok. Sauté for another minute.
Add beef kidneys and continue cooking until they become golden brown, approximately 10 minutes.
Stir in turmeric powder and lemon juice. Season with salt as needed and mix well.
Gently stir in bell peppers and cilantro. Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until vegetables are just tender.
Serve hot with steamed basmati rice.
